issue_title: fix: Backtracking now doesn't create dots at end of lines
issue_body_preview:
See: https://github.com/steveruizok/perfect-freehand/issues/48

This fixes a bug where sharp corners would sometimes cause a "dot" to appear at the end of a line. The bug happened because some sharp corners were not getting detected. To detect them, I made it also check the dot-product of the curr
test_description_zh: 在画布上使用自由手绘工具绘制包含急转弯/尖角的线条，特别是在线条末端进行回退（反向移动）操作，观察线条末端的渲染效果。
expected_result_zh: 绘制包含尖角或回退操作的线条时，线条末端应平滑结束，不应出现多余的圆点（dot）伪影。
